enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Andru Vandhathum'?

The song 'Andru Vandhathum' reflects themes of love and nostalgia, capturing the essence of cherished memories.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the classic film Periya Idathu Penn.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary artists P. Susheela and T. M. Soundararajan.

Who composed the music for 'Andru Vandhathum'?

The music for 'Andru Vandhathum' was composed by the renowned duo Viswanathan–Ramamoorthy.

When was 'Andru Vandhathum' released?

'Andru Vandhathum' was released on May 10, 1970.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Andru Vandhathum' from the movie Periya Idathu Penn is a beautiful melody that evokes feelings of nostalgia and romance. It captures the essence of love through its heartfelt lyrics and soothing composition. The enchanting voices of P. Susheela and T. M. Soundararajan add depth to the emotions conveyed in the song. This classic piece continues to resonate with listeners, making it a timeless favorite in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Andru Vandhathum is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and nostalgia, beautifully rendered by the legendary voices of P. Susheela and T. M. Soundararajan. This enchanting song from the classic film Periya Idathu Penn showcases the exquisite composition of Viswanathan–Ramamoorthy, making it a cherished favorite among Tamil music lovers. Experience the magic of this song that transcends generations and evokes heartfelt emotions.
stanzaMeanings: That moon came yesterday, cha cha cha
That moon has come today, cha cha cha
Always present is that one moon, cha cha cha
For both of their eyes, there is one moon.
The moon seen by Ambikapathi is the moon that transcends all.
The moon sung by Kamban is the moon that dances in poetry, the moon that dances in poetry.
That moon came yesterday, cha cha cha
That moon has come today, cha cha cha
Always present is that one moon, cha cha cha
For both of their eyes, there is one moon.
The moon seen by love's Romeo is the moon that Juliet saw.
The moon seen by the beautiful Laila is the moon of the colorful sky.
The moon that came to the entire country is the moon seen in the city.
The moon that was seen and admired is the half moon that has faded away.
That moon came yesterday, cha cha cha
That moon has come today, cha cha cha
Always present is that one moon, cha cha cha
For both of their eyes, there is one moon.
